title: Curse supersedes opponent AL increases

card.rawText: All creatures on your opponent's side of the field have their AL reduced to 1. This card supersedes other AL increases.

plan.title: Curse supersedes opponent AL increases
plan.summary: Put a positive AL aura on the opponent's creature, then play Curse and verify its AL stays reduced to 1.

notes: Pre-place Full Moon on player_2's field so the opponent Were creature has a competing +5 AL aura.
Curse stays in player_1 hand until the fixture plays it as field magic.

steps: Pre-place Full Moon as player_2 field magic.
Player 1 plays Curse as field magic.
Read player_2 primary effective AL after Curse and Full Moon both apply.

expectedAssertions.label: Curse suppresses the competing AL increase
Curse remains in player 1 magic slot
Full Moon remains as the competing AL source

manualVerification: Confirm Curse suppresses positive AL increases only for opponent creatures while it remains field-active.
riskNotes: This fixture validates Curse's printed supersedes clause through final effective AL with a competing Full Moon aura.

coverageSuggestion.notes: Validate Curse modifier suppression against a positive AL aura.

runnerNotes: Create a dev match from plan.setup, execute plan.steps, then verify plan.expectedAssertions.
The deterministic engine and manual QA status remain source of truth.
